title: RingtonePlayer play()+getTitle() confused deputy
notes: CONFIRMED on Pixel 10 Android 16 patch 2026-04-05. Zero-permission PoC: shell UID 2000 obtains IRingtonePlayer Binder via AudioService.getRingtonePlayer() (no perm check), calls getTitle() on contacts/sms/calllog/media/calendar/downloads/telephony — all succeed. play() on contacts photo URI succeeds — SystemUI opens file with its privileges. getTitle() returns URI path segment (not actual content) for non-media providers, but confirms SystemUI acts as confused deputy accessing protected providers on caller's behalf.
